channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: NASA is set to begin training with a prototype of Blue Origin's crew moon lander
item.description: The space agency is planning to put astronauts on the moon in 2028.

item.title: Fintech startup Parker files for bankruptcy
item.description: Parker, a well-funded startup offering corporate credit cards and banking services, has filed for bankruptcy and is widely reported to have shut down.

item.title: Test du Bissell CrossWave HydroScrub Pro : il lave plus blanc, mais sèche sur le banc
item.description: Bissell, on les connaissais pour leurs détacheurs. On a testé un aspirateur-laver, la marque américaine se frotte aux marques chinoises.

item.title: The electric scooter rental company Lime has filed for IPO
item.description: The startup has expanded to more than 230 cities across the world, but has yet to become profitable.

item.title: GM agrees to pay $12.75M in California driver privacy settlement
item.description: General Motors has reached a privacy-related settlement with a group of law enforcement agencies led by California Attorney General Rob Bonta.

item.title: 'LLMs can infer private attributes from ad exposure alone': AI can tell a lot about you just based on the overall patterns of ads you see, without the need to access your browsing history or personal data — and not even a VPN can protect you
item.description: AI can infer personal traits from ad exposure patterns alone, turning everyday advertising streams into detailed profiles without direct access to private data

item.title: Skulking in Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor is superb, and the Nemesis System is yet to be bested by 12 years of action games
item.description: The best Lord of the Rings game is essentially fanfiction, but the Nemesis system is still the best in class.

item.title: UFC 328 live stream: how to watch Chimaev vs Strickland, start time, preview, full card
item.description: Two titles are on the line in Saturday's huge event – follow our guide to live stream UFC 328 online and watch Khamzat Chimaev vs Sean Strickland from anywhere.
